findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_activity_details" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Read-only details for a single activity/product. Response includes `booking_link`, `thumbnail_url`, `group_size`, and a standardized `item_card`. Listing conten…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
